mission: Create the best open LM in the world — fully open: training data, model code, training infrastructure, everything.

public_goals.title: Beat SmolLM-135M
public_goals.description: Train a fully-open ~135M-param LM that beats SmolLM-135M on val loss and standard small-LM evals, with every component public: data pipeline, configs, training code, logs.
public_goals.why: First public rung on the ladder to the best open LM. Small enough to be reproducible by anyone, big enough to be a real claim.

milestones.label: Mechanism screening pipeline finding real wins (value-channel gate, residual norm gate)
135M recipe: scale winning mechanisms, open data mix
Train + eval vs SmolLM-135M, publish everything

public_goals.title: Open training infrastructure
public_goals.description: Distributed training infrastructure that scales from donated single GPUs to data-center clusters — the compute layer that the open LM trains on.
public_goals.why: The best open LM needs open infrastructure; closed labs' moat is infra as much as weights.

milestones.label: Single-box run queue with detached runs (universe-lm on Vast)
Donated-compute task queue: anyone attaches a GPU, pulls screening jobs
Multi-node data-parallel training for the 135M run
Data-center scale distributed training (method TBD - open question)

private_goals.title: Finish the cheap-multiplicative-gates paper
private_goals.next: All controls + scale confirmation done: VCG confirmed (-0.1075 at 10M tier), RNG inverted. Full10M200M record attempt running overnight; then final figures + publish.

strategy_ladder: 1. 2026-27: be undeniably best at small scale - beat SmolLM-135M, then the 1-3B tier, with fully-open reproducible recipes. Costs thousands, not billions.
2. Convert proof into a patron: sovereign funds, foundations, or a Mistral-style raise for an open lab - ask with a verified track record of 10x intelligence-per-FLOP, not a vision deck.
3. Spend patron-scale compute through our recipe stack. DeepSeek-V3 proved ~100x efficiency vs frontier spend is possible; recipes are what our factory mass-produces.

Failure condition (falsifiable): if frontier scaling keeps paying linearly AND efficiency gains stop transferring upward, #1 stays gated behind billions. We watch for DeepSeek-style gap-closings as the signal.
mission_note: Donated/distributed compute cannot match datacenters on FLOPs (2-3 orders of magnitude gap, permanently). It wins at massively parallel mechanism screening - intelligence-per-FLOP, not FLOPs.
